[![water dark blue and digital clock](https://www.monash.edu/__data/assets/image/0009/4077117/24-2025_promoBox_690x435_v02.jpg)\\
\\
**We have the momentum now to create the future we need.** \\
\\
At Monash, we’ve been driving change for decades—when it mattered most.\\
\\
We’ve harnessed our knowledge, capability, creativity and scale to make real change, every second of every day. Today, we have the momentum to create the future we need for generations to come. There is no time to wait.\\
\\
**Every second marks change. Join us.**\\
\\
Learn more](https://www.monash.edu/momentum) [![Dr Akari in Afghanistan](https://www.monash.edu/__data/assets/image/0005/3808670/women-peace-690px.jpg)\\
\\
Alumni\\
\\
\\
**Get inspired with Monash Life** \\
\\
In this issue we take a nostalgic ride through the idiosyncratic and ink-stained history of _Lot’s Wife_: 60 years young, and still (mostly) hitting those deadlines. Professor Jacqui True and Dr Farkhondeh Akbari examine the impact of women’s participation on creating lasting peace. And our experts reveal the actions that really count when it comes to fighting climate change.\\
\\
Read Monash Life](https://www.monash.edu/alumni/monash-life)

## Our world university rankings

We've achieved an enviable reputation for research and teaching excellence in a short 50 years and are [ranked among the world's top universities](https://www.monash.edu/about/our-rankings).

- ### Ranked 36th globally





2026 QS World University Rankings.

- ### Business Administration





Ranked #3 in the world and #1 in Australia, Shanghai Ranking Global Ranking of Academic Subjects 2024.





#3

- ### Pharmacy and pharmacology





Ranked #4 in the world and #1 in Australia, QS World University Rankings by Subject 2025.





#4

- ### 35th in the world





We rank 35th in the US News and World Report 2024-25 Best Global Universities Rankings.


![](https://www.monash.edu/__data/assets/image/0012/2669727/read-the-plan-1.jpg)[Impact 2030](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y3uy8Jh7e4Q?autoplay=1?enablejsapi=1 "Impact 2030")

Strategic plan


## Impact 2030

Monash University has the ambition and capabilities through its excellence in education and research, its record for innovation and collaboration, and its international profile to address the global challenges of our age. We encourage you to read our Strategic Plan, _Impact 2030_, and join our commitment to ensuring a better future for ourselves and for the communities in which we study, work, live and engage.

[Find out more](https://www.monash.edu/about/strategic-direction/strategic-plan)

\\

\\

[**Monash researchers awarded $53.3 million in NHMRC Ideas Grants**\\
![Monash University news](https://www.monash.edu/__data/assets/image/0008/539225/default-news-thumbnail.jpg)\\
\\
Monash researchers will share in $53.3 million across a total of 32 awards, as a part of the National Health and Medical Research Council (NHMRC) Ideas Grant scheme.\\
\\
University news14 January 2026](https://www.monash.edu/news/articles/monash-researchers-awarded-$53.3-million-in-nhmrc-ideas-grants)

[**New research reveals how Tibetan Plateau-Himalayan uplift shaped Asian summer monsoons**\\
\\
Research from Monash University reveals the climate history behind Asia’s summer monsoon – Earth’s most influential climate system.\\
\\
Science13 January 2026](https://www.monash.edu/news/articles/new-research-reveals-how-tibetan-plateau-himalayan-uplift-shaped-asian-summer-monsoons)

[**Scientists find microbes enhance the benefits of trees by removing greenhouse gases**\\
\\
Australian researchers have discovered a hidden climate superpower of trees. Their bark harbours trillions of microbes that help scrub the air of greenhouse and toxic gases.\\
\\
Science9 January 2026](https://www.monash.edu/news/articles/scientists-find-microbes-enhance-the-benefits-of-trees-by-removing-greenhouse-gases)
